import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";/**
 * NotificationPanel.jsx — Panel de notificaciones del Navbar

 * Dropdown que se abre al pulsar el ícono de campana en el Navbar.
 * Muestra la lista completa de notificaciones con acciones rápidas.
 *
 * Separado del AvatarDropdown para que sea accesible directamente
 * sin pasar por ajustes.

 * Props:
 *   notifs      — array de notificaciones (estado desde HomeScreen)

 *   onClose     — cierra el panel
 *
 * Estilos: SettingsScreen.css + clases nuevas (.notif-panel, .np-*)
 */export default function NotificationPanel(_ref){let{notifs,setNotifs,onClose}=_ref;const unread=notifs.filter(n=>!n.read).length;const markAll=()=>setNotifs(p=>p.map(n=>({...n,read:true})));const markOne=id=>setNotifs(p=>p.map(n=>n.id===id?{...n,read:true}:n));const clearAll=()=>setNotifs([]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"notif-panel",onClick:e=>e.stopPropagation(),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-corner-tl"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-corner-tr"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-corner-bl"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-corner-br"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"np-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"np-title",children:["\uD83D\uDD14 NOTIFICACIONES",unread>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"np-badge",children:unread})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"np-actions",children:[unread>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"np-btn",onClick:markAll,children:"LEER TODO"}),notifs.length>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"np-btn danger",onClick:clearAll,children:"LIMPIAR"})]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-list",children:notifs.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"np-empty",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-empty-icon",children:"\uD83D\uDD15"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-empty-text",children:"SIN NOTIFICACIONES"})]}):notifs.map(n=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`np-item${!n.read?" unread":""}`,onClick:()=>markOne(n.id),children:[!n.read&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-dot"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"np-item-icon",children:n.icon}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"np-item-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-item-title",children:n.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-item-desc",children:n.desc}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"np-item-time",children:n.time})]})]},n.id))})]});}
